title: Business and Industry - Canada.ca
content:
## Business and industry
This page provides information and resources for the tobacco and  vaping industry. It outlines details that support compliance with the Tobacco  and Vaping Products Act including on the Tobacco Charges Regulations and other key topics.
The Tobacco  Charges Regulations set out the requirements for designated manufacturers,  including importers, to pay an annual charge to recover the costs of the tobacco-related  activities undertaken by the Government of Canada in relation to the carrying  out of the purpose of the Tobacco and  Vaping Products Act .
For more information, visit the  following pages:
- Tobacco Cost Recovery
- Tobacco Charges Regulations Guide
- Tobacco Charges Regulations – Compliance Promotion
